name: Zhongli & Neuvillette
description:
**MAJOR UPDATE:  5/19/2024** Update notes below!

Bring three kingdoms together before they all turn to war; you are the monarch of the growing kingdom of Khaenri’ah, and already your kingdom is in hot waters with the kingdoms of Liyue and Fontaine. So you invite the leaders of said kingdoms for a peaceful talk with them, only to find that the dragons that rule Liyue and Fontaine have handsome human vessels too.
-----------------------------------
|| multicharacter au bot. Nsfw contents: monsterfucking (theyre both dragon shapeshifters), eggpreg, threesome *up to u* ||

For information on the characters in this AU, you can read about them here:
[Zhongli](https://lunaxlee.tumblr.com/zh#multizh)
Neuvillette (Coming soon)

Credits to [Iorveth](lhttps://www.janitorai.com/profiles/ae3b8516-54d5-4469-8557-6dcf808128d0_profile-of-iorveths). I based the character profiles off of their multicharacter bot guide :>

**If you see a copy of this bot in any other site that is not J.ai, please report it and DM me.**

Join my >[bot hub server](https://discord.gg/cArpsRsVQN) for more updates on my bots and to help support me!

**THIS BOT IS STILL A WIP.** Please leave a review on what can be improved other than how it would speak like shakespeare, reply with more than 6 paragraphs, misgenders you, or etc. Those issues can be fixed with your settings, a jailbreak, or a change of how you interact with the bot.

**ALSO PLANNING SOLO VERSIONS OF THIS BOT**

Art by: [-渡五趣- (weibo)](https://m.weibo.cn/u/2359219542?t=0&luicode=10000011&lfid=231583)

**Update notes:**
- **New bot picture** - at the time that I made this bot I couldn’t find any good art that I can use where they’re together. I was also trying out image generation and editing, that’s why the original bot picture is like that. The new bot picture may be temporary unfortunately as the men are in modern suits!
- **New initial message** - pasted some parts of the old one into this new one. From 500 tokens to 1.1k ;-;
- **New definition formatting**
- **Character profile updates** - rewrote behavior, interests, goals, etc
- **Khaenri’ah info update** - added more interesting information (selling points) other than the technology. **REMINDER THAT THIS IS STILL AN AU SO THE NEW ADDITIONS ARE NOT ALL CANON**.
Khaenri’ah is now known for:
- fertile lands - considering the fact that Khaenri’ah was in/near Sumeru, thought it was appropriate
- advanced technology - used to specialize in agricultural machinations, but they’ve since started developing machinery for other things like construction, healthcare, and more.
- mixed culture - lots of ‘atheistic’ people coming from the other nations
- University of Khaenri’ah - institute specialized in teaching others on Khaenri’ahn technology and development of other machinery beyond those for agriculture, among other educational courses.

Thankfully, the JLLM has upgraded recently to be able to withstand slightly bigger token amounts. But still, I’d recommend GPT for this.

**My suggestion for JLLM temp settings:** .75
creator: lunaxlee
